title: Rural Community Innovation Grant
description: Supports rural entrepreneurship hubs, broadband labs, and workforce development.

title: Clean Energy Deployment for Small Businesses
description: Funding for solar, battery storage, and energy efficiency retrofits.

title: Youth STEM Pathways Program
description: Expands coding clubs, mentorship, and robotics pathways in underserved districts.

title: Public Health Equity Accelerator
description: Supports mobile clinics, telehealth pilots, and preventive care outreach.

title: Main Street Small Business Revitalization
description: Helps local businesses modernize storefronts, websites, and operations.

title: Resilient Coastal Infrastructure Grant
description: Funds flood mitigation, stormwater upgrades, and emergency readiness projects.
